caption:
Neon rain doesn't wash away the thrill, it just makes the voltage higher. ⚡️

I adjusted the glowing circuitry on my corset, feeling the hum of the city against my skin. My leather bodysuit whispered against the wet metal. He was waiting in the shadow, eyes locked on mine. We were stealing a data core, but the spark was between us.

I shifted my stance, the high slit of my tactical skirt revealing a flash of thigh, daring him to look lower. His gaze dropped, a slow fire tracing my waist. The rain dripped from my lips, mixing with the metallic tang. He stepped closer, his heat cutting through the cool damp. I leaned into him, the magnetic pulse of the suit reacting to our proximity. My heart raced like a fusion reactor. We moved like a shadow, synchronized, breathless.

He kissed me—electric, sharp, tasting of ozone. I bit back, nails digging into his jacket. The core was hot in my hand, but my skin burned hotter. We vanished into the data stream, two sparks in the dark, leaving only the echo of our pulse. The city roared, but we were in our own frequency, lost in the static of desire. Tonight, the code wasn't the only thing running wild. 🔥

#CyberpunkLife #NeonNights #FutureFashion #SciFiRomance #DigitalDesire #CyberSiren #UrbanAdventures #TechWear
